title: Apache Log4j2 Remote Code Execution (Log4Shell)
description: A critical vulnerability in Apache Log4j2 allows unauthenticated remote code execution via JNDI lookups. Affected versions: 2.0-beta9 to 2.14.1.

title: Apache HTTP Server RewriteRule substitution injection
description: A vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server allows substitution injection in RewriteRule.

title: Pimcore Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
description: Pimcore before 5.3.0 allows XSS via the admin/misc/scriptlet extension parameter.

title: Grafana XSS via Playlist
description: Grafana allows XSS via the playlist feature, affecting versions 8.0.0 to 9.2.10.
